textByHash.d876bbdf992371bbf64023acbb1acf2c47d9ceee: Nilsal to you, iknami. Welcome to the Grand Museum. I hope your visit is a pleasant one. If you have any questions about Varlamore, I'm happy to help.
textByHash.57c856d41cc96376250d2bdf2616869d3bd784c2: Oh yes, Xerna's Diadem... Quite a shame, isn't it? Do you know anything about it?
textByHash.cf06e018c6bde9db80a761bf7a6af4820f2c2868: That would certainly be most appreciated. The local guards said they'd investigate for us, but it's not proven to be a fast process so far.
textByHash.80022e5867cb350fa630267971db14b88a02163f: I was starting to consider trying to find it myself, but I'm no detective. It doesn't seem to me like anything else is even out of place...
textByHash.5858998e69366c7cdf6f0326c5ab7cb086fbcc08: Perhaps you'll have better luck though. Maybe you could have a look around for any sort of clues and see if you can find anything wrong.
textByHash.98aebd7481156110fae860cddcb17ccbaad0f10b: Nilsal to you, iknami. Welcome back to the Grand Museum. If you have any questions, I'm happy to help.
textByHash.0254e415188912fdea6e1da41e453c7e9619aa6a: How are you getting on with your investigation?
textByHash.d86a0a4cc14984f7a6b16fe62f2aff6cb53bd2e2: Well, you have our thanks for all your efforts in finding it. Thank you, iknami.
textByHash.6474b13be893dabc5231e599036417661d38e837: It sounds like you have a lead, iknami. You should follow it.
textByHash.21fa8154232370f47b3546359f93b87f08ea7900: It is? That's great news! Where did you find it?
textByHash.d672fe261a76b4703f79baa73e78cdbf0cb2f302: Well, what matters is that you found it. Now, I guess you'll be expecting that reward the display mentioned?
textByHash.c39389c91b38b811db108dcbefcacee04a04d946: Well, what matters is that you found it. Now, I guess you'll be expecting that reward the display mentioned? Here you go.
